changeSet.author: artemis
changeSet.sql: UPDATE grading_criterion gc SET grading_criterion_order = ordered.order_index FROM ( SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY exercise_id ORDER BY id) - 1 AS order_index FROM grading_criterion ) ordered WHERE gc.id = ordered.id;

UPDATE grading_instruction gi SET grading_instruction_order = ordered.order_index FROM ( SELECT id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY grading_criterion_id ORDER BY id) - 1 AS order_index FROM grading_instruction ) ordered WHERE gi.id = ordered.id;

changeSet.author: artemis
